user.title: Notification History
user.description: Record all notifications (mobile and persistent) in a searchable history panel. No further setup is required; retention can be adjusted later via the Configure button.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. Only a single instance is possible.

data_description.max_age_days: Notifications older than this are removed.
data_description.max_entries: When exceeded, the oldest notifications are removed first.
data_description.ignored_services: Calls to these notify services will not be recorded.
